    F

    findAllByEquipmentOrganizationId(Long) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Returns all temperature logs for equipment belonging to a specific organization.
    findAllByEquipmentOrganizationIdAndTimestampBetween(Long, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Returns all temperature logs for a given organization within a timestamp range.
    findAllByOrganizationId(Long) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.ChecklistRepository
    Returns all checklists belonging to a specific organization.
    findAllByOrganizationId(Long) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DeviationRepository
    Returns all deviations for a given organization.
    findAllByOrganizationId(Long, Pageable) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DeviationRepository
    Returns a paginated list of deviations for a given organization.
    findAllByOrganizationIdAndCreatedAtBetween(Long, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DeviationRepository
    Returns all deviations for a given organization created within a timestamp range.
    findAllByOrganizationIdOrderByNameAsc(Long) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.EquipmentRepository
    Returns all equipment belonging to a specific organization, ordered by name ascending.
    findByDocument(TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DocumentAcknowledgementRepository
    Returns all acknowledgements for a specific training document.
    findByDocument(TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.PracticalTrainingSignOffRepository
    Returns all practical sign-offs for a specific training document.
    findByDocument(TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TrainingQuizQuestionRepository
    Returns all quiz questions for a specific training document.
    findByEmail(String) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.UserRepository
    Returns the user with the given email address, if one exists.
    findByEmployee(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.PracticalTrainingSignOffRepository
    Returns all practical sign-offs for a specific employee.
    findByEmployeeAndDocument(User, TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.PracticalTrainingSignOffRepository
    Returns the practical sign-off for a specific employee and document, if it exists.
    findByOrganization(Organization) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.CertificationRepository
    Returns all certifications earned within a specific organization.
    findByOrganization(Organization) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.UserRepository
    Returns all users belonging to a specific organization.
    findByOrganizationAndActiveTrue(Organization) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TrainingDocumentRepository
    Returns all active training documents for a given organization.
    findByOrganizationAndRole(Organization, Role) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.UserRepository
    Returns all users in a given organization with a specific role.
    findByOrganizationAndRoleIn(Organization, List<Role>) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.UserRepository
    Returns all users in a given organization with any of the specified roles.
    findByOrganizationAndTypeAndActiveTrue(Organization, TrainingDocumentType) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TrainingDocumentRepository
    Returns all active training documents of a specific type for a given organization.
    findByOrganizationIdAndRecordedAtBetweenOrderByRecordedAtDesc(Long, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.AlcoholLogRepository
    Returns all alcohol log entries for a given organization within a timestamp range, ordered by recorded time descending.
    findByOrganizationIdAndShiftDateOrderByRecordedAtDesc(Long, LocalDate) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.AlcoholLogRepository
    Returns all alcohol log entries for a given organization and shift date, ordered by recorded time descending.
    findByUser(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.CertificationRepository
    Returns all certifications earned by a specific user.
    findByUser(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DocumentAcknowledgementRepository
    Returns all acknowledgements made by a specific user.
    findByUser(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TrainingAttemptRepository
    Returns all training attempts made by a specific user.
    findByUserAndDocument(User, TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.CertificationRepository
    Returns the certification earned by a specific user for a specific training document, if it exists.
    findByUserAndDocument(User, TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DocumentAcknowledgementRepository
    Returns the acknowledgement for a specific user and document, if it exists.
    findFiltered(Long, ModuleType, Frequency, Pageable) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.ChecklistRepository
    Returns a paginated list of checklists for a given organization, with optional filtering by module type and frequency.
    findTop10ByEquipmentOrganizationIdOrderByTimestampDesc(Long) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Returns the 10 most recent temperature logs for a given organization.
    findTop5ByEquipmentOrganizationIdAndIsDeviationTrueOrderByTimestampDesc(Long) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Returns the 5 most recent temperature deviation entries for a given organization.
    findTopByUserAndDocumentOrderByCompletedAtDesc(User, TrainingDocument) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TrainingAttemptRepository
    Returns the most recent training attempt by a specific user for a specific document.
    Frequency - Enum Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.model
    Enumeration representing how often a task or checklist should be performed.
    FsV26Application - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26
    Entry point for the Checkd Spring Boot application.
    FsV26Application() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.FsV26Application
